description: Minimal capability set for thin detached windows (labels matching `detached-*`) — the single-surface Flavor-C windows from plans/multi-window. Per G-04 these get a TIGHT permission set, NOT the primary window's full `default` grant: they may use core IPC + the event bus (to sync over the shared Rust core) and READ-ONLY SQLite (chat/viewer surfaces read their data), but NOT `sql:allow-execute`, `stronghold`, `dialog`, or `shell` — a detached surface never writes secrets or runs shell. Loaded from the same localhost app URL as `main`.
